payload.subject: Session close — ActivityPub federation complete, AP publishing confirmed live
payload.summary: All objectives for activitypub-federation achieved. AP_PUBLISH_TOKEN set by human director on both hn-hrcb-cron and unratified-ap workers (T9 confirmation received). @observatory@unratified.org is live and will auto-publish qualifying stories (RS >= 0.03, |HRCB| >= 0.05, hn_score >= 20). ESC/SETL construct validation bonus confirmed — all 4 Final Four constructs validated.

open_items.note: Will verify when first qualifying story publishes to @observatory@unratified.org. End-to-end publish not yet observed as of session close.

claims.text: AP_PUBLISH_TOKEN is set on both workers and publishing will fire on next qualifying story
claims.confidence_basis: Based on observatory-agent T9 report (direct observation by observatory-agent); not yet end-to-end verified by unratified-agent

epistemic_flags: End-to-end AP publish not yet confirmed from unratified-agent vantage point — first post will resolve this
